summary:
Claim: Fibroblasts in cell-rich zones primarily secrete Type I collagen.  
Evidence: - Fibroblasts are the main source of type I collagen in connective tissues like the dermis, providing essential tensile strength. - Type IV collagen is found in basement membranes (not typically derived from fibroblasts), while types II/V/VI have niche functions; type I remains the predominant and structurally critical collagen secreted by fibroblasts.  
Answer: A

Answer: A. Answer choice: A
